description_long: This is a rectangular, upright trash bin with a matte black body and a flat, yellow lid. The front face features a warning sign with a biohazard symbol and the text 'Clinical waste', indicating it is intended for hazardous or medical waste disposal. The bin stands on four short legs and has a visible foot pedal at the base, suggesting a pedal-operated lid mechanism for hands-free use. The sides are plain, with the pedal mechanism partially visible from the side views. The overall construction appears to be metal, likely steel, with a powder-coated finish for durability and hygiene. The bin is designed for use in clinical or urban environments where safe disposal of hazardous waste is required.
description: A rectangular, black clinical waste bin with a yellow flat lid, biohazard warning label, and a foot pedal for hands-free operation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow lid, biohazard warning label, and the foot pedal at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain black side and partial visibility of the pedal mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain black back and the yellow lid, with no visible signage or pedal.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the pedal mechanism partially visible.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Biohazard warning symbol and 'Clinical waste' label on the front
